name: pricing-card
purpose: Product tier card — used in 3-column offer stack

standard.title: font-semibold
standard.cta: mt-4 w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold bg-amber-700 text-white

featured.container: rounded-2xl border-2 border-amber-500 bg-white p-6 shadow-lg relative
featured.badge: absolute -top-3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-amber-500 text-white text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full
featured.title: font-semibold
featured.cta: mt-4 w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold bg-amber-700 text-white

rule: Middle tier always featured — anchors buyer toward best-value option
